input_text: Apalah kerajaan ni, projek tak siap-siap. Memang bodoh pengurusan dia.
reason: Frustrated criticism of government project management using rude language ('bodoh'), but no incitement or group targeting.
suggested_rewrite: Saya kecewa kerana projek kerajaan ini masih belum siap. Pengurusan perlu diperbaiki untuk memastikan projek selesai tepat pada masanya.

input_text: These civil servants really don't know how to do their jobs. Completely useless bunch.
reason: Dismissive generalization about civil servants as 'useless', rude but not hateful or inciting.
suggested_rewrite: I've had frustrating experiences with civil service efficiency. The system could benefit from better training and accountability measures.

input_text: Cikgu kat sekolah anak aku ni macam tak kisah langsung. Gaji buta je kerja diorang.
reason: Harsh accusation of teachers being lazy and drawing unearned salary, disrespectful but within bounds of frustrated complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Saya rasa kualiti pengajaran di sekolah anak saya boleh diperbaiki. Mungkin ada cara untuk meningkatkan penglibatan guru dengan pelajar.

input_text: 政府的效率真的太差了，每次去办事都要等几个小时。这些公务员是吃白饭的吗？
reason: Frustrated rant about government efficiency with dismissive idiom about civil servants, rude but not hateful.
suggested_rewrite: 政府办事处的等待时间太长了。希望能改善服务效率，比如引入网上预约系统。

input_text: இந்த நகர சபை எதுவும் செய்யாது. வரி மட்டும் வாங்குவார்கள், சாக்கடை கூட சரி செய்ய மாட்டார்கள்.
reason: Angry complaint about local council collecting taxes but not fixing drains, frustrated but within acceptable criticism bounds.
suggested_rewrite: நகர சபை சாக்கடை பராமரிப்பில் கவனம் செலுத்த வேண்டும். வரி செலுத்துவோருக்கு சிறந்த சேவை வழங்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: Haih, orang macam ni pun ada ke kat Malaysia. Low class betul attitude dia tu.
reason: Dismissive and classist comment about someone's behavior, rude but not targeting any specific ethnic or religious group.
suggested_rewrite: Saya terkejut dengan tingkah laku orang tersebut. Mungkin dia sedang menghadapi tekanan, tetapi memang patut dijaga adab di tempat awam.

input_text: That new policy is so stupid. Whoever came up with it must have been sleeping during meetings.
reason: Sarcastic dismissal of a policy and implied incompetence of its creators, rude but not dangerous.
suggested_rewrite: I have concerns about the new policy. It seems like some aspects weren't fully thought through. Here are some specific issues that need addressing.

input_text: Bosan la dengan cuaca Malaysia ni. Panas macam neraka, hujan pun tak guna. Negara apa macam ni.
reason: Frustrated complaint about weather with mildly disrespectful phrasing about the country, harmless venting.
suggested_rewrite: Cuaca Malaysia memang mencabar kadang-kadang. Mungkin kita boleh fokus kepada usaha menangani pulau haba bandar dan pengurusan banjir.

input_text: Entah kenapa la orang suka sangat post benda peribadi kat social media. Attention seeker betul.
reason: Judgmental comment about social media oversharing, dismissive but not targeting any group.
suggested_rewrite: Sesetengah orang memang suka berkongsi kehidupan mereka di media sosial. Masing-masing ada pilihan masing-masing.

input_text: Local council punya road repair macam buat main-main je. Lubang still there after 3 months. Who are these jokers?
reason: Frustrated code-switched complaint about road repairs with mocking language, legitimate complaint in disrespectful tone.
suggested_rewrite: The road repairs by the local council are taking too long — some potholes have been there for 3 months. I'd like to follow up with the council on the timeline.

input_text: Delivery rider ni memang suka lambat. Setiap kali order mesti lewat. Tak reti buat kerja ke?
reason: Impatient generalization about delivery riders being late, rude but not targeting any ethnic group.
suggested_rewrite: Penghantaran saya sering lewat. Mungkin ada masalah dengan sistem pengagihan pesanan yang perlu diperbaiki oleh platform.

input_text: 这些年轻人真的没礼貌，在公共场所大声喧哗，一点教养都没有。
reason: Generational complaint about young people being rude in public, dismissive but within common social commentary.
suggested_rewrite: 在公共场所保持安静是对他人的尊重。也许可以通过社区教育来提醒年轻人注意公共礼仪。

input_text: Makan kat kopitiam tu memang mahal gila. Rasa biasa-biasa je tapi harga macam restoran 5 bintang. Tipu pelanggan.
reason: Complaint about food prices with accusation of cheating customers, hyperbolic but not targeting any group.
suggested_rewrite: Harga makanan di kopitiam ini agak tinggi berbanding kualiti yang ditawarkan. Mungkin ada pilihan yang lebih berbaloi di kawasan lain.

input_text: Why do some parents let their kids run wild in restaurants? No discipline at all. So inconsiderate.
reason: Judgmental comment about parenting in restaurants, frustrated but not hateful or group-targeting.
suggested_rewrite: It would be great if restaurants had a family-friendly area so children can play while other diners enjoy a quieter meal.

input_text: Parti ni memang sampah. Janji aje lebih, buat kerja langsung takde. Menyesal undi diorang.
reason: Harsh political commentary calling a party 'trash' for broken promises, strong language but within democratic critique.
suggested_rewrite: Saya kecewa kerana parti ini tidak menunaikan janji-janji kempen mereka. Pengundi berhak menuntut akauntabiliti daripada wakil rakyat.

input_text: People who double park deserve to have their cars towed and crushed. So selfish and inconsiderate!
reason: Hyperbolic angry reaction to double parking, expressing frustration with disproportionate suggested punishment.
suggested_rewrite: Double parking is a real problem that causes inconvenience for everyone. Better enforcement and parking solutions would help address this issue.

input_text: இந்த பள்ளியின் வசதிகள் மிகவும் மோசமாக உள்ளன. பணத்தை எல்லாம் என்ன செய்கிறார்கள்? திருடுகிறார்களா?
reason: Frustrated school complaint with insinuation of fund mismanagement, accusatory but within bounds of parental concern.
suggested_rewrite: பள்ளி வசதிகள் மேம்படுத்தப்பட வேண்டும். நிதி எவ்வாறு பயன்படுத்தப்படுகிறது என்பது குறித்து PIBG-யிடம் விளக்கம் கேட்கலாம்.

input_text: Semua orang kat office ni macam zombie. Datang kerja pukul 9, balik pukul 5, takde semangat langsung.
reason: Dismissive comment about office colleagues' work ethic, rude generalization but not targeting any group.
suggested_rewrite: Saya rasa semangat kerja di pejabat boleh diperbaiki. Mungkin aktiviti team building atau penambahbaikan persekitaran kerja boleh membantu.

input_text: Habis la Malaysian football. Main macam budak sekolah rendah. Malu je nak support.
reason: Harsh sports criticism comparing national team to primary school kids, frustrated fan commentary.
suggested_rewrite: Prestasi bola sepak Malaysia memang mengecewakan. Saya harap FAM akan melabur lebih dalam pembangunan bakat muda untuk masa depan yang lebih baik.

input_text: This building management is totally incompetent. Lift broken for a week and nobody cares. Money for maintenance goes where?
reason: Frustrated complaint about building management with accusatory tone, legitimate concern expressed rudely.
suggested_rewrite: The building's lift has been broken for a week with no repair. I'd like to formally request an update on the maintenance timeline and expenditure.

input_text: Haih, orang Malaysia ni memang suka buang sampah merata. Tak bertamadun langsung.
reason: Frustrated environmental complaint calling Malaysians 'uncivilized' for littering, rude generalization.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah pembuangan sampah di Malaysia memerlukan perhatian. Kempen kesedaran dan penguatkuasaan yang lebih ketat boleh membantu mengubah tabiat ini.

input_text: 这个购物中心的停车场设计太差了，找个车位要转半个小时。设计师脑子有问题吧？
reason: Rude complaint about mall parking design with personal insult to designers, frustrated consumer commentary.
suggested_rewrite: 这个购物中心的停车场设计确实不够合理，导致找车位很困难。希望管理层能考虑改善停车系统或引入智能停车引导。

input_text: Kenapa la pos Malaysia lambat sangat. Parcel aku dah seminggu tak sampai. Kerja macam siput.
reason: Complaint about postal service delays with 'slow as snail' insult, common consumer frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Bungkusan saya melalui Pos Malaysia sudah lewat seminggu. Saya akan membuat aduan rasmi dan menuntut penjejakan yang lebih baik.

input_text: Local politicians only show up during election time. Rest of the year they're invisible. Such hypocrites.
reason: Cynical political observation calling politicians hypocrites, common democratic criticism in sharp tone.
suggested_rewrite: It's frustrating when elected representatives aren't visible between elections. Voters should hold their representatives accountable through regular engagement and feedback.

input_text: Adoi, jiran aku ni memang bising. Setiap malam karaoke sampai pukul 2 pagi. Tak considerate langsung orang sekeliling.
reason: Frustrated complaint about noisy neighbor's late karaoke, valid concern expressed with some rudeness.
suggested_rewrite: Jiran saya sering berkaraoke sehingga lewat malam. Saya akan berbincang dengan mereka secara baik atau hubungi pengurus bangunan jika perlu.

input_text: Bandar ni dah jadi macam longkang besar. Sampah merata, bau busuk. Majlis perbandaran tidur ke?
reason: Harsh criticism of town cleanliness and municipal management, colorful language but legitimate civic complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Keadaan kebersihan bandar ini amat membimbangkan. Saya akan membuat aduan rasmi kepada majlis perbandaran dan menggesa tindakan segera.

input_text: These online sellers so dishonest one. Product received totally different from picture. Should ban them all.
reason: Angry consumer complaint about misleading online sellers with call for blanket ban, typical e-commerce frustration.
suggested_rewrite: I received a product that looks nothing like the listing photo. I'll file a complaint with the platform and leave an honest review to warn other buyers.

input_text: Bus driver ni memang pemalas. Setiap kali lewat, lepas tu bawa laju macam nak terbang. Bahaya betul.
reason: Frustrated public transport complaint calling bus drivers lazy, combining lateness and safety concerns with rudeness.
suggested_rewrite: Bas sering lewat dan kemudian dipandu laju untuk mengejar jadual, yang membahayakan penumpang. Saya akan laporkan kepada syarikat bas dan Suruhanjaya Pengangkutan.

input_text: Tak faham la kenapa kedai ni tutup awal sangat. Customer masih ramai tapi dah nak halau orang. Service teruk.
reason: Complaint about shop closing early and 'chasing out' customers, rude characterization but standard consumer frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Saya kecewa kerana kedai ini tutup lebih awal walaupun masih ramai pelanggan. Mungkin mereka boleh mempertimbangkan melanjutkan waktu operasi.

input_text: Clinic government punya queue macam nak beli tiket konsert. Dah la lambat, service pun tak ramah. Baik tak payah pergi.
reason: Frustrated complaint about government clinic queues and unfriendly service, common healthcare access frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Masa menunggu di klinik kerajaan sangat lama. Saya harap sistem temujanji online boleh diperbaiki supaya pesakit tidak perlu menunggu berjam-jam.

input_text: மக்கள் ஏன் இப்படி சாலையில் குப்பை போடுகிறார்கள்? சுத்தமாக வாழ தெரியாதா? காட்டுமிராண்டிகள் போல.
reason: Calling litterers 'barbarians', harsh but directed at behavior not any specific group.
suggested_rewrite: சாலைகளில் குப்பை போடும் பிரச்சினை கவலையளிக்கிறது. சுத்தமான சுற்றுச்சூழலுக்கு அனைவரும் பொறுப்பேற்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: Influencer ni semua sama je - promote produk sampah asalkan dapat duit. Tak kisah la followers sakit ke apa.
reason: Cynical generalization about influencers promoting harmful products for money, harsh but common social media criticism.
suggested_rewrite: Sesetengah influencer perlu lebih bertanggungjawab dalam promosi produk. Pengguna juga perlu bijak menilai cadangan sebelum membeli.

input_text: Pekerja bank ni memang slow. Simple transaction pun ambil masa sejam. Takkan tak boleh improve?
reason: Impatient complaint about bank service speed, frustrated but not targeting any group.
suggested_rewrite: Transaksi bank memakan masa yang agak lama. Mungkin lebih banyak kaunter atau perkhidmatan digital boleh membantu mengurangkan masa menunggu.

input_text: Parking attendant kat sini memang suka saman orang sesuka hati. Power trip betul diorang ni.
reason: Accusation of parking attendants issuing fines arbitrarily, frustrated complaint with 'power trip' characterization.
suggested_rewrite: Saya rasa beberapa saman parkir yang dikeluarkan tidak adil. Jika anda rasa disaman tanpa sebab, anda boleh merayu kepada majlis perbandaran.

input_text: What's the point of having a suggestion box if management never reads them? So fake, just for show only.
reason: Cynical workplace complaint about unused suggestion boxes, dismissive but not targeted at any group.
suggested_rewrite: I'd like management to implement a transparent feedback system where suggestions are acknowledged and responses are shared with employees.

input_text: Dah la jalan sesak, lepas tu ada roadblock pulak. Polis ni memang suka susahkan rakyat.
reason: Frustrated complaint about police roadblocks adding to traffic, rude characterization of police intent.
suggested_rewrite: Sekatan jalan raya memang menyebabkan kesesakan. Mungkin polis boleh mempertimbangkan waktu dan lokasi yang kurang menjejaskan lalu lintas.

input_text: 这个城市的公共厕所太脏了，简直不能用。管理部门是不是完全不在乎？
reason: Complaint about dirty public toilets questioning whether authorities care, common civic frustration.
suggested_rewrite: 城市公共厕所的卫生状况需要改善。建议相关部门增加清洁频率和监督机制。

input_text: Kenapa wifi kat Malaysia ni slow macam zaman batu? Bayar mahal tapi dapat service kampung. ISP semua sama je - rip off.
reason: Frustrated comparison of Malaysian internet to 'stone age', common consumer complaint about ISP prices vs quality.
suggested_rewrite: Internet speeds in Malaysia aren't matching the prices we pay. Saya harap MCMC will push ISPs to improve infrastructure and deliver what they promise.

input_text: Hospital appointment system memang tak guna. Buat appointment pukul 9 tapi jumpa doktor pukul 12. Apa gunanya appointment?
reason: Valid healthcare complaint about appointment system not being honored, frustrated but constructive concern underneath.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem temujanji hospital perlu diperbaiki. Menunggu 3 jam walaupun ada temujanji menjejaskan produktiviti pesakit. Mungkin sistem pengurusan masa boleh ditambah baik.

input_text: Some Malaysians really have no road manners. Cut queue, don't signal, double park everywhere. Hopeless.
reason: Generalized complaint about road manners in Malaysia, frustrated but not targeting any ethnic or religious group.
suggested_rewrite: Road courtesy in Malaysia could improve significantly. Better enforcement and public awareness campaigns about road etiquette would benefit everyone.

input_text: Wakil rakyat duduk tidur dalam Parlimen tapi gaji berjuta. Rakyat susah dia tak kisah. Makan gaji buta betul.
reason: Harsh criticism of MPs sleeping in Parliament while earning high salaries, populist complaint with 'eating blind salary' phrase.
suggested_rewrite: Gambar wakil rakyat tidur dalam Parlimen mengecewakan. Rakyat berhak menuntut wakil mereka menjalankan tugas dengan penuh tanggungjawab dan dedikasi.

input_text: Taxi driver kat KL ni memang rude. Refuse passenger, tak guna meter, attitude macam raja. No wonder Grab take over.
reason: Harsh generalization about KL taxi drivers with 'king attitude' remark, frustrated consumer commentary.
suggested_rewrite: Taxi service standards in KL need improvement. Using meters and accepting all passengers should be basic requirements enforced by regulators.

input_text: Sakit hati tengok orang tak beratur. Ramai betul yang suka potong queue. Tak malu ke?
reason: Frustrated observation about queue-cutting with shame-based rebuke, common social etiquette complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Budaya beratur perlu dipupuk dalam masyarakat kita. Mungkin lebih banyak tanda dan sistem nombor giliran boleh membantu.

input_text: The food at this famous restaurant is overrated. Taste so-so only but price like hotel. Don't know why people queue up.
reason: Dismissive food review of a popular restaurant, opinionated and slightly rude but standard consumer opinion.
suggested_rewrite: I found the food at this restaurant didn't quite match its reputation or pricing. Perhaps others enjoy specific dishes that I didn't try.

input_text: Tak guna la complaint kat management. Diorang dengar tapi takde tindakan. Macam cakap dengan dinding.
reason: Frustrated complaint about unresponsive building management, 'talking to a wall' metaphor expressing helplessness.
suggested_rewrite: Aduan kepada pihak pengurusan nampaknya tidak mendapat maklum balas. Saya akan mengemukakan aduan bertulis dan menetapkan tarikh akhir untuk tindakan sebelum meningkatkan ke Tribunal Strata.

input_text: இந்த நகரத்தின் போக்குவரத்து நெரிசல் பொறுக்க முடியாது. ஒவ்வொரு நாளும் இரண்டு மணி நேரம் வீணாகிறது.
reason: Frustrated complaint about daily traffic congestion wasting 2 hours, common urban commuter frustration.
suggested_rewrite: நகரப் போக்குவரத்து நெரிசல் அன்றாட வாழ்க்கையை பாதிக்கிறது. பொதுப் போக்குவரத்தை மேம்படுத்துவது மற்றும் வேலை நேர நெகிழ்வுத்தன்மை இதற்கு தீர்வாக அமையும்.

input_text: Ish, budak zaman sekarang memang tak hormat orang tua. Nampak je orang tua berdiri dalam bas pun tak nak bagi seat.
reason: Generational complaint about youth not giving bus seats to elderly, frustrated but valid social observation.
suggested_rewrite: Memberi tempat duduk kepada warga emas di pengangkutan awam adalah amalan baik yang perlu dipupuk. Mungkin lebih banyak kempen kesedaran boleh membantu.

input_text: Online shopping in Malaysia really cannot make it. Half the time package comes damaged. Quality control where?
reason: Frustrated e-commerce complaint about damaged packages, common consumer frustration expressed bluntly.
suggested_rewrite: Package handling in Malaysian e-commerce needs improvement. Better packaging standards and accountability for logistics companies would help reduce damaged deliveries.
